# zara-jira-mcp

> AI-powered Scrum Master MCP server with persistent memory

## What This Is

A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that gives AI assistants full Scrum Master capabilities: Jira operations, sprint intelligence, Monte Carlo forecasting, risk management, anti-pattern detection, team health monitoring, and multi-channel notifications.

224 tools. Persistent SQLite memory across sessions. Works with any MCP-compatible AI client.

## Key Capabilities

- Jira Cloud CRUD (issues, sprints, epics, bulk operations)
- Sprint health scoring (0-100) with velocity, blockers, scope, team balance
- Monte Carlo forecasting (10,000 simulations, probability-based dates)
- Anti-pattern detection (hero culture, zombie sprints, scope creep, dead retros)
- Risk/blocker/decision memory that persists across sessions
- Executive reports (business language, no jargon)
- Multi-channel notifications (Lark, Slack, Discord, Telegram, Teams, Email)
- Portfolio overview across multiple projects
- AI coaching and ceremony facilitation

## Integration

Transport: stdio (local MCP server)
Protocol: Model Context Protocol (MCP) / JSON-RPC 2.0
Language: Go

## Configuration

Set PM_PROFILE env var to control tool count:
- lite: ~30 tools (fastest)
- pm: ~60 tools (recommended for PM/Scrum Master)
- standard: ~100 tools (PM + notifications)
- full: ~150 tools (PM + GitHub visibility)
- (none): all 224 tools

## Quick Start for AI Agents

1. Call `jira_boards` to get board_id
2. Call `pm_standup_prep(board_id)` for daily prep
3. Call `pm_sprint_health(board_id)` for health check
4. Call `pm_forecast(board_id, remaining_items:N)` for delivery forecast
5. Call `pm_exec_report(board_id)` for stakeholder report

## Documentation

- AGENTS.md: AI agent integration guide
- SKILL.md: Complete tool reference (224 tools with parameters)
- docs/agents/: Setup guides for 20 AI clients
- docs/profiles.md: Performance profile guide
- docs/reporting-guide.md: Management reporting scenarios
- docs/engineering-literacy.md: Engineering concepts for PM/SM
